title: GTA+
headline: GTA+
subtitle: This Month’s Benefits
content:
In addition to the recurring monthly GTA$500,000 deposited directly into your Maze Bank account, GTA+ Members who've signed up for this month (July 14 — August 12) will also receive:

— The Grotti Veleno GT
— GTA$1,000,000 off the new Art Studio expansion for your Mansion property
— The new Orange Manor Bomber Zipped jacket
— 2X GTA$ and RP on HSW Time Trials
— And more

Membership automatically renews monthly, cancel anytime. Visit rsg.ms/gtaplus for more info.
